rationale: The two ensures share the closure literal `|k: K| id_zero@`, but z3 needs help instantiating the underlying `mk_map` axiom for each view. Asserting the per-key consequences (`r1@[k] == id_zero@`, `r2@[k] == id_zero@`) and the domain equality (`Set::full() =~= Set::full()`) lines up the triggers so that Map extensionality (`=~=`) discharges `r1@ == r2@`.
